# GsakName=US Minor Outlying Islands
#
# Polygons for the following island/atolls are included in this file:
#
#    Baker Island
#    Howland Island
#    Jarvis Island
#    Johnston Atoll
#    Kingman Reef
#    Midway Atoll
#    Navassa Island
#    Palmyra Atoll
#    Wake Island
#
# The following two are sometimes also considered a part of the US Minor
# Outlying Islands, but they are disputed and administered by Colombia,
# so they have not been included in this file:
#
#    Bajo Nuevo Bank (administered by Colombia)
#    Serranilla Bank (administered by Colombia)
#
# Each areas in this file is the exclusive economic zone around each
# island/atoll.
#
# Howland and Baker Islands
#
